tr.td: Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mild hypoglycemia, elevated creatinine suggesting impaired renal function, mild hyperchloremia, low globulin, elevated ALT, and low AST. Liver synthetic function appears preserved. These findings may indicate chronic kidney disease with possible mild liver enzyme disturbance. Clinical correlation and further evaluation of renal and hepatic status are recommended.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
